title: The Pedant
content:
Lysander talks extremely well;
On any subject let him dwell
His tropes and figures will content ye
He should possess to all degrees
The art of talk; he practises
Full fourteen hours in four-and-twenty.
meaning:
Matthew Prior's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Pedant"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
